---
title: "Adding distribution families"
output: rmarkdown::html_vignette
vignette: >
  %\VignetteIndexEntry{Adding distribution families}
  %\VignetteEngine{knitr::rmarkdown}
  %\VignetteEncoding{UTF-8}
---

```{r, include = FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(collapse = TRUE, comment = "#>")
```

This developer article will explain the workflow for adding a new `drmTMB`
family: family registry entry, likelihood, simulation, starting values, tests,
documentation, and examples.

The current planning references are `docs/design/02-family-registry.md` and
`.agents/skills/add-family/SKILL.md`.
